features: PACK OF 6: Indulge in luxury with 6 bottles of Royale Garden Lemon & Basil Body Wash
VIBRANT SCENT: Delicate body wash with refreshing notes of lemon and basil for a rejuvenating shower experience
FEATURES: Vegan-friendly formula that is reusable, perfect for those seeking a sustainable option
TOILETRIES: Add a touch of elegance to your daily routine with this luxurious body wash from the Royale Garden collection
BENEFITS: Leaves skin feeling cleansed, refreshed and subtly scented with the invigorating fragrance of lemon and basil
description: Product Description A delicately refreshing mix of citrus bursts, blended with the herbal tones of basil to leave your skin and body feeling energised, revitalised and beautifully cleansed. Take a stroll through an English garden with out assortment of country classics. Timeless toiletries combine with stunning illustrations and sensational scents that celebrate the best of the natural world. Florals, fruits and feminine motifs provide the perfect products for house-proud self purchase or effortless gifting. Ingredients Aqua (Water, Eau), Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Chloride, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Peg-4 Rapeseedamide, Sodium Benzoate, Glycerin, Parfum (Fragrance), Glycol Distearate, Laureth-4, Citric Acid, Tetrasodium Edta, Sodium Hydroxide, Limonene. Directions Lather and Rinse Safety Warning WARNING: AVOID CONTACT WITH EYES. IF PRODUCT GETS IN THE EYES RINSE IMMEDIATELY WITH CLEAN WARM WATER. IF SKIN IRRITATION OCCURS DISCONTINUE USE. IF IRRITATION PERSISTS CONSULT YOUR DOCTOR See more
